title: ODI Matrix — NAICS 221122 Electric Power Distribution (DSO view, hardware tier)

sections.title: Step 1 — Needs gathered (13 entries)
sections.content:
All 13 needs inherited from FIT Step 10 product-related list for 221122. Each carries `job_step_number=0`, `job_step_name="product_constraint"`, `product_related=true`. No Step 06 market-level needs were resolvable beyond the references already embedded in FIT Step 11; this ODI run therefore scores the 13 product-related needs only.

---

sections.title: Step 2 — Satisfaction recalibration (incumbent-anchored)
sections.content:
Incumbent reference set: **Fluence Gridstack (~30% DE DSO)**, Sungrow PowerTitan, SMA Sunny Central Storage, Tesla Megapack/Autobidder, Wärtsilä GEMS, Siemens Grid Integration, Hitachi Energy, ABB, Nidec ASI.

| # | S_orig | S_recal | Evidence from Step 03 / Step 11 |
|---|---|---|---|
| PR1 | 3.0 | **3.0** | Fluence relies on DE in-country cert partner — schedule-slip risk confirms low S |
| PR2 | 4.0 | **4.0** | Tier-1 OEMs acknowledge TR8 acceptance delays on contested feeders |
| PR3 | 6.0 | **5.0** | Moss Landing 2024 + McMicken propagation events show S was optimistic even for tier-1 containers |
| PR4 | 5.0 | **5.0** | No contradiction; Feuerwehr/VdS risk applies to any Li-ion container |
| PR5 | 5.0 | **5.0** | 40–80 m²/MWh footprint is structural across all containerized incumbents |
| PR6 | 5.0 | **6.0** | Fluence / Tesla ship 10-yr 85 % RTE performance guarantees — raise S |
| PR7 | 4.0 | **6.0** | Fluence Mosaic / Tesla Autobidder include degradation-aware monitoring — raise S |
| PR8 | 4.0 | **4.0** | DSO-specific redispatch logic less mature than arbitrage; no evidence S should rise |
| PR9 | 5.0 | **5.0** | Standard HVAC envelopes handle −20/+50 °C — no contradiction |
| PR10 | 5.0 | **5.0** | Hot-swap module + PCS-N+1 offered by Sungrow/Fluence — parity |
| PR11 | 4.0 | **4.0** | FX / tariff / CRMA cell-price volatility persists across incumbents |
| PR12 | 5.0 | **5.0** | €250–400/kWh band holds; no upward adjustment |
| PR13 | 4.0 | **4.0** | EU Battery Regulation recycling infra still nascent |

Importance scores unchanged (importance-stability rule).

---

sections.content:

| PR11 | Tender-price variance ±10 % from cell volatility | 7.0 | 4.0 | **10.00** | — | — |
| PR13 | EU Battery Reg / CRMA recycling non-compliance | 7.0 | 4.0 | **10.00** | — | — |

| PR9 | HVAC collapse at −20 °C / +50 °C extremes | 6.0 | 5.0 | **7.00** | — | — |

**Underserved (I>7 AND S<5):** PR1, PR8, PR2 — 3 entries.
**Overserved (I<3 AND S>7):** none.
**Sum of opp scores:** 147.00 · **Avg:** 11.31.

sections.title: Step 4 — Market ODI summary
sections.content:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| market_name | DSO-Owned Netzbooster Storage |
| naics_code | 221122 |
| total_needs | 13 |
| underserved_count | 3 |
| overserved_count | 0 |
| avg_opportunity_score | 11.31 |

**Top-5 opportunities (by opp score desc):**
1. Minimize the likelihood of grid-code certification (VDE-AR-N 4110 Type B / FGW TR8) slipping the DSO project critical path by >3 months — 15.00
2. Minimize the likelihood of thermal-runaway propagation across adjacent modules or containers during a single-cell fault — 15.00
3. Minimize the likelihood of simultaneous unavailability during a redispatch event because SoC is parked too high or too low — 14.00
4. Minimize the likelihood of Feuerwehr or VdS rejection of container siting due to clearance / hydrant access — 13.00
5. Minimize the time to achieve DSO acceptance after commissioning for a containerized LFP plant at a contested MV feeder — 12.00

---

sections.title: Step 5 — Cross-check vs Step 09 Feature-Fit
sections.content:
From FIT Step 09 overall_fit avg across 6 tech features = (4.89+5.33+5.11+6.67+6.89+4.56)/6 = **5.58**.
ODI avg = 11.31 (appropriately served band).

- ODI avg <12 and Feature-Fit avg <4 → neither cross-check threshold triggered.
- High-leverage alignment: **F5 Grid-Code Certification Delivery** (overall_fit 6.89, Mein Solar vendor_score 9) directly addresses the #1 ODI opportunity (PR1 cert slip, opp=15). ✅ Feature-opportunity alignment confirmed.
- Gap flag: **PR8 SoC-parked-wrong (opp=14, underserved)** depends on EMS quality. F4 EMS overall_fit=6.67 but Mein Solar vendor_score=5 (inferior vs Fluence Mosaic 8). → Mein Solar captures the opportunity only with a tier-1 EMS partner (Entrix, Next Kraftwerke, Tiko).

---

sections.content:
| # | Check | Result |
|---|---|---|
| Q1 | `opp = I + max(I−S, 0)` spot-check on 5 entries | PASS (PR1 15.00, PR3 15.00, PR6 8.00, PR9 7.00, PR13 10.00) |
| Q2 | Underserved flag iff I>7 AND S<5 | PASS (PR1, PR2, PR8 only) |
| Q3 | Overserved flag iff I<3 AND S>7 | PASS (none) |
| Q4 | Entry count ≥ Step 10 need count | PASS (13 = 13) |
| Q5 | Top-5 sorted desc on opp_score | PASS |
| Q6 | Cross-check vs Step 09 Feature-Fit | PASS (executed, alignment + gap noted) |

---
